required_preferences.fact: Listens to audiobooks exclusively for tech and design topics — avoids paper books to reduce wrist strain

supersedes.fact: Reads design and tech books in paper format only — never uses e-books or audiobooks

required_preferences.fact: Communicates primarily via company email for all urgent and core project discussions — only uses Slack for informal or cross-team quick notes as required by company policy

supersedes.fact: Uses Slack exclusively for client communication — never replies to emails about urgent project issues

required_preferences.fact: Incorporates collaborative meal planning and cooking with her partner during weekday evenings, replacing solo meal routine
Prefers shared walks or light indoor activities with her partner for post-work stress relief rather than solo park outings with roommate
Keeps a portable emergency allergy kit (including epinephrine auto-injector) in her work bag at all times, never leaves home without it
Keeps a dedicated journal for public speaking notes, ideas, and reflections until the conference is over — never used a separate journal for work before

persona: A 24-year-old mobile app developer freelancing full-time
